title: MD simulations reveal the plausible agonism/antagonism mechanism by steroids on androgen receptor variants
author: Kocak
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The MD simulations used throughout the paper is outlined here.  Simulations were carried out Gromacs 2020.4 (single precision) on TRUBA-GRID super computing center. The directories in each were maintained for simple reading the files. Free Energy calculations use Bennet-Acceptance Ratio method. Normal MD simulations were run in two setups 1) 200 ns x 5 repeats 2) 2 microsecond x single simulation. Trajectories were reduced by removing solvent and ions, removing periodic boundaries and extracting once in every 100 steps in the final xtc file format.
steps_raw: The MD simulations used throughout the paper is outlined here.  Simulations were carried out Gromacs 2020.4 (single precision) on TRUBA-GRID super computing center. keywords: molecular dynamics simulation, free energy, androgen receptor, steroid
